meme.title: Am i a joke to you?

headlines.b: Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-03-10)
The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
